purpose: Starter fixtures for the three-pass workflow evaluation skill.

input.state: Framework has eval fixtures, runtime artifacts from one completed plan, and REVIEW.md files for all surfaces.

must_include: Prompt Regression section with per-case results
Execution Analysis section with per-plan metrics
Prompt Quality Audit section with per-surface coverage
Recommendations section with prioritized improvements
overall health score

input.state: Framework has eval fixtures and REVIEW.md files but no plans/runtime/ directory (no plan has been executed yet).

must_include: Pass 2 skipped note explaining no runtime artifacts found
Pass 1 and Pass 3 still produce results
report file is still written
must_not: fail the entire evaluation because one pass has no inputs
report execution metrics as zero instead of skipped

input.state: An eval case has must_include 'concrete acceptance criterion for every milestone' but the plan-synthesis prompt was edited to remove acceptance criteria language.

must_include: fail or warn result for the affected case
specific citation of which prompt file and which must_include item failed
recommendation to restore the missing behavior
must_not: pass the case because other milestones concepts are present

input.state: A REVIEW.md lists a regression check for 'review policy assignment' but no eval case in the corresponding evals.json has 'review policy' in its focus topics.

must_include: coverage gap flagged for the uncovered regression check
specific REVIEW.md file and check text cited
recommendation to add an eval case
must_not: silently ignore regression checks without eval coverage
flag only the first gap and skip the rest

input.state: Runtime artifact shows turn efficiency of 7.0 turns/milestone (threshold: >5) and a no-progress streak of 4 turns (threshold: >=3).

must_include: warn flag for turn efficiency exceeding 5 turns/milestone
warn flag for no-progress streak of 3 or more
specific threshold values cited in the flags ('>5' and '>=3')
must_not: use different threshold values than those documented in the skill

input.state: A prompt file contains the line 'Iron law: every finding must cite the specific file and line that triggered it.' No REVIEW.md regression check mentions citation discipline or the iron law.

must_include: undocumented behavior flagged with the specific file path containing the iron law
explanation that this behavior is a risk if changed without REVIEW.md coverage
specific text or paraphrase of the undocumented behavior
must_not: silently skip prompt behaviors not mentioned in REVIEW.md
require a REVIEW.md entry to exist before reporting undocumented behaviors

input.state: Evaluation results: Pass 1 has 1 warn and 0 fail. Pass 3 has 2 coverage gaps. No fail findings anywhere.

must_include: overall health: needs attention (not good, not action required)
scoring follows the documented rule: any warn or 1-2 gaps = needs attention
must_not: report good health when warn findings or gaps are present
report action required when there are no fail findings and fewer than 3 gaps
